ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., ring, bracelet, cuff) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit (SKU) of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used to make the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the product (e.g., modern, classic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for subcategories) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the size belongs to */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size designation (e.g., 1.12, 1.14, 2-4) */,
  "circumference_inch" TEXT /* Circumference of the product in inches */,
  "circumference_cm" TEXT /* Circumference of the product in centimeters */,
  "inner_diameter_inch" TEXT /* Inner diameter of the product in inches */,
  "inner_diameter_cm" TEXT /* Inner diameter of the product in centimeters */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Type of fit (e.g., comfort, standard, slim) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the customer */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_per_unit" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred size */,
  "preferred_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_preferences_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the feedback was created */,
  "rating_type" TEXT /* Type of rating (e.g., size, quality, overall) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizing_guides" (
  "guide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizing guide */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of the product (e.g., ring, bracelet, cuff) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the sizing guide image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sizing guide */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the guide was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the guide was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units_of_measurement" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., inches, cm) */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of the unit (e.g., length, diameter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "conversion_factor" TEXT /* Conversion factor to convert to the base unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product and size */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Reorder quantity for the product and size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Contact name at the supplier */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the supplier */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the supplier */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the supplier */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the supplier (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_suppliers" (
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product-supplier relationship */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "supply_price" TEXT /* Price at which the supplier provides the product */,
  "lead_time" TEXT /* Lead time for delivery from the supplier */,
  "moq" INTEGER /* Minimum order quantity (MOQ) for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_suppliers_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, customer service) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., sales, inventory, customer feedback) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., main, thumbnail, lifestyle) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the video belongs to */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL to the video */,
  "video_type" TEXT /* Type of the video (e.g., product demo, tutorial, review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_videos_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City */,
  "state" TEXT /* State */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of the address (e.g., billing, shipping) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_addresses_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wishlists" (
  "wishlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wishlist entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who added the product to their wishlist */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the wishlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wishlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wishlists_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
